Assessment for Human Biological Sample Management (HBSM)

External Organisation/Institution: University of Helsinki

Completed By:

Date Completed:

Human Biological Samples

Please provide the requested details for all Human Biological Samples in scope of your engagement with GSK.

This information can be provided in an existing format as an attachment or list if available.

Human Biological Sample Management

Please respond to the questions below to provide an overview of your approach to HBS management.

For GSK HBSM Team Use only

List ALL Human Biological Samples | Origin and Description | Source/Vendor/Catalog Number
(if known) | Country(ies) of origin | Samples already collected (Existing) or to be collected
Sample description
(eg. skin, blood, embryonic stem cell, etc) | e.g. adult
fetal
embryonic | | | Existing/Prospective

Is there a possibility that material of embryonic (e.g. embryonic stem cells) or fetal origin or derivatives will be used in ANY work which comprises part of this engagement/collaboration? 

Note: GSK has policies in place which restrict the use of embryonic or fetal samples and their derivatives in research. All such use requires approval by the GSK President of R&D | Is there a possibility that material of embryonic (e.g. embryonic stem cells) or fetal origin or derivatives will be used in ANY work which comprises part of this engagement/collaboration?

Overarching HBSM

Data Management (associated with subject/HBS)
